criteria_results.criterion: A trio run's accumulated draft_state carries a non-empty `title` (within the Plan.title 200-char limit) that binds to PlanForm.title, produced by A1's reasoning rather than a fixed/placeholder string.
criteria_results.evidence: title first in NARRATIVE_FIELDS (specs.py:407) + PlanForm.Meta.fields (forms.py:293); live run_trio_pass (mocked LLM) lands a bare `title` in final draft_state; audit proved non-vacuous via monkeypatch (drop title -> trio test KeyErrors); no hardcoded title in production code (grep planner/ ai/services/ -> only test fixtures); the template instructs the model to produce it. 200-char hard enforcement is at PlanForm save (slice 8a-ii); the template instructs <=200.

criteria_results.criterion: A1's existing four narrative scalars still parse and fold unchanged; an A1 response lacking a title degrades gracefully to a partial prefill exactly as a missing scalar does today.
